item.title: PyGeoModel: A Python Package for Integrating Intelligent Geographic Model Services into Jupyter's Interactive Computing Environment
item.description: Presented at the 2025 conference in Jiaozuo and received the Best Paper award.

item.title: PyGeoModel
item.description:
PyGeoModel is an intelligent Python package for urban and geographic modeling within Jupyter environments.

It combines model recommendation, interactive configuration, question answering, and service-based execution to make geographic modeling more accessible in computational notebooks.

item.title: Construction of an open knowledge framework for geoscientific models
item.description: The paper presents a three-level framework covering model resources, their related materials, and practical application knowledge, with OpenGMS as an implementation case.
